articles.title: Stutzle shines, Cozens stays hot in Senators' win over Flames
articles.description: Tim Stutzle dazzled with the puck all night long, Dylan Cozens scored again, Linus Ullmark was sharp in goal and the Ottawa Senators defeated the Calgary Flames 4-1 to move within four points of the Boston Bruins for the final wild card spot in the Eastern Conference.
